content: LiveKit Analysis Complete: 6 patterns identified. ADOPT: ReusableCompleter (drop-in fix for async bugs). ADAPT: DisposableChangeNotifier, SessionError taxonomy, AudioTrackState machine. AVOID: CachingTokenSource (Supabase handles), RoomContext/Provider widgets (conflicts with Riverpod). Key finding: ReusableCompleter fixes latent double-completion bugs in capturePhotoDescription() and confirmCalendarEvent().
